name: Easy Low-Fat Refried Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 cans black beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the corn oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and sauté until brown and caramelized, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the minced garlic and cook until golden brown.
4. Stir in the rinsed black beans, cumin, oregano, chili powder, cayenne pepper, black pepper, white pepper, red Tabasco sauce, green Tabasco sauce, and salt. Mix well to combine.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
6. Use a potato masher or food processor to mash the beans until smooth and creamy. If desired, thin out with additional liquid (such as bean cooking liquid) or Tabasco sauce to reach desired consistency.
7. Serve immediately with your favorite Mexican dish, such as tacos, burritos, or enchiladas. For a dip, serve with tortilla chips.
